statement: In every magma, Equation 737 (`x = y * (y * ((z * w) * z))`) implies Equation 3891 (`x * x = (y * (y * y)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0308
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op y (op (op z w) z)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op (op y (op y y)) y)
